voices.name: Roger - Laid-Back, Casual, Resonant
voices.desc: Easy going and perfect for casual conversations.

voices.name: Sarah - Mature, Reassuring, Confident
voices.desc: Young adult woman with a confident and warm, mature quality and a reassuring, professional tone.

voices.name: Laura - Enthusiast, Quirky Attitude
voices.desc: This young adult female voice delivers sunny enthusiasm with a quirky attitude.

voices.name: Charlie - Deep, Confident, Energetic
voices.desc: A young Australian male with a confident and energetic voice.

voices.name: George - Warm, Captivating Storyteller
voices.desc: Warm resonance that instantly captivates listeners.

voices.name: River - Relaxed, Neutral, Informative
voices.desc: A relaxed, neutral voice ready for narrations or conversational projects.

voices.name: Harry - Fierce Warrior
voices.desc: An animated warrior ready to charge forward.

voices.name: Liam - Energetic, Social Media Creator
voices.desc: A young adult with energy and warmth - suitable for reels and shorts.

voices.name: Alice - Clear, Engaging Educator
voices.desc: Clear and engaging, friendly woman with a British accent suitable for e-learning.

voices.name: Matilda - Knowledgable, Professional
voices.desc: A professional woman with a pleasing alto pitch. Suitable for many use cases.

voices.name: Jessica - Playful, Bright, Warm
voices.desc: Young and popular, this playful American female voice is perfect for trendy content.

voices.name: Eric - Smooth, Trustworthy
voices.desc: A smooth tenor pitch from a man in his 40s - perfect for agentic use cases.

voices.name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
voices.desc: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

voices.name: Chris - Charming, Down-to-Earth
voices.desc: Natural and real, this down-to-earth voice is great across many use-cases.

voices.name: Brian - Deep, Resonant and Comforting
voices.desc: Middle-aged man with a resonant and comforting tone. Great for narrations and advertisements.

voices.name: Daniel - Steady Broadcaster
voices.desc: A strong voice perfect for delivering a professional broadcast or news story.

voices.name: Lily - Velvety Actress
voices.desc: Velvety British female voice delivers news and narrations with warmth and clarity.

voices.name: Adam - Dominant, Firm
voices.desc: A bright tenor pitch that immediately cuts through. The delivery is brash and openly confident, speaking with unwavering certainty and a slightly aggressive self-assurance.

voices.name: Bill - Wise, Mature, Balanced
voices.desc: Friendly and comforting voice ready to narrate your stories.

voices.name: David - British Documentary
voices.desc: David - British Documentary - Old, British male nature documentary voice.

voices.name: Gabby
voices.desc: Gabby - Unique female voice. Canadian and Atlantic accent. 25 years old. Slightly raspy.

voices.name: JM - Husky & Engaging (2025-01-25_1100)
voices.desc: James - Husky & Engaging - A slightly husky and bassy voice with a standard American accent. Modulated, controlled, and direct and perfect for audiobooks, captivating narrations, or storytelling, or other professional voiceover work.

voices.name: Male voice
voices.desc: Native English, neutral American. Male, late teens to early 20s. Very good quality. Persona: young survivor, street-smart. Emotion: wry, restless, guarded. A lighter male voice with a slight rasp, not deep but with texture from a life spent in rough places. Delivery is fast and impulsive, words tumbling out like he's already three thoughts ahead. Jokes land quick and casual, but there's a thinness underneath, a kid pretending he's not scared.

voices.name: Gateborn - Main Narrator
voices.desc: A mature male voice, narrator of a odyssey, which is warm and kind. The tone carries a sense of loss.

voices.name: Mining Overseer
voices.desc:
Voice of a rodent in a cartoon, he's nervous but trying to be stoic.

Studio quality.

voices.name: Gateborn Intro Narrator - Old british Woman
voices.desc: Native English, British with soft ecclesiastical cadence. Female, 90s. Excellent quality. Persona: temple elder. Emotion: solemn, devoted, certain. A very hoarse, rich, measured alto with weight and gravity. Each word is placed with intention, as if reading sacred text for the thousandth time and still meaning every syllable. Pacing is slow and deliberate.

voices.name: Gateborn Intro narrator - Elder woman
voices.desc: Native English, British with soft ecclesiastical cadence. Female, late 60s to 70s. Excellent quality. Persona: temple elder. Emotion: solemn, devoted, certain. A rich, measured alto with weight and gravity. Each word is placed with intention, as if reading sacred text for the thousandth time and still meaning every syllable. Pacing is slow and deliberate, with long pauses between passages. She does not perform. She recites.

voices.name: Kaelric
voices.desc: A deep, male voice of a human lion. Thick, gravelly tone with a resonant, theatrical quality that's menacing yet still warm. Perfect audio quality.

voices.name: Guard Dog
voices.desc: A male, mid-low pitched voice with a firm but slightly exaggerated, cartoony authority. Clear, rounded articulation and confident delivery, like a Disney animated guard dog enforcing rules. He sounds disciplined, earnest, and a little overzealous, with mild theatrical emphasis on important words. Clearly stylized. Neutral accent, steady pacing, and clean studio-quality audio.

voices.name: Matt - Deep Authoritative Narrator
voices.desc: Deep, resonant American baritone built for audiobooks, documentary narration, and long‑form YouTube content. Authoritative, smooth, and calm — a voice that makes any story feel serious and compelling.

voices.name: Sigmon
voices.desc: Middle-aged American male. Thoughtful, sincere, approachable.

voices.name: Iria Sorain
voices.desc: A female voice in her early to mid 30s. Mid-pitched, calm, slightly husky from fatigue. Clear articulation, restrained emotion. She speaks at a measured, thoughtful pace, with brief pauses as if checking her words against internal calculations. Subtle Northern European or neutral accent. Curious but cautious tone, never dramatic. She sounds like a navigator who reads unstable space for a living and has learned not to trust certainty. Studio-quality audio.

voices.name: Sparks
voices.desc: Native English, neutral American with slight warmth. Male, early 20s. Very good quality. Persona: charming young rogue. Emotion: playful, confident, slightly cocky. A smooth, warm tenor with a light, agile quality. Natural charisma in the delivery, with a hint of mischief behind every line. Pacing is quick and conversational, speeding up when excited or improvising. He sounds like someone who's talked his way out of trouble more times than he can count, and enjoys it.

voices.name: Amie - Trustworthy Southern Female
voices.desc: Amie is a warm, calming female voice with a soft Southern accent and a confident, easy delivery. Clear and natural, she fits e-learning and explainer videos, corporate and brand narration, audiobooks and storytelling, meditation and wellness content, and phone or IVR systems. A polished American voice with genuine Southern warmth for projects that want a steady, trustworthy, approachable sound.

voices.name: Oliver Haddington
voices.desc: Oliver Haddington - A mature voice which is warm and kind with just a hint of whimsical humor wrapped in a distinctly indistinct British accent.

voices.name: Villain - harsh, abrasive, and volatile
voices.desc: A villain voice with a raw, gravelly texture and controlled intensity. Dark, commanding, and intimidating without being overbearing, capable of powerful moments as well as a steady, simmering menace. Grounded and rough-edged, well-suited for antagonists, bosses, warlords, and complex enemies in animation, gaming, and cinematic storytelling.

voices.name: Phil O - Deep, Gritty Cinematic Narrator
Siddhartha - Deep, Gravelly & Hoarse
voices.desc: A slightly deep voice with a light rasp and a subtle, breathy quality, giving it a natural, lived-in feel.
